profile: Fixed serialized Authority Document, Authority Proof, relying-party pin, and complete typed result/check/reason/input/result-digest fixtures. A passing join accepts the registry issuer only; grant/action and delegation evaluation remain separate.

proof.subject: ep:approver:ada
limitations: This proof records what the authority registry held for the subject at issuance; it does not itself authorize the action.
It is a snapshot: revocation.status is as of checked_at, and a later revocation is not reflected here.
Acceptance requires the relying party to pin the registry issuer key out of band; verification alone is not acceptance.
